summary: Erection All Risks insurance covering mechanical and electrical plant, machinery, and steel structures during installation, erection, and testing. Common for energy, manufacturing, and infrastructure projects. DSU exposure closely linked.

schemaEntities.description: Erection project entity. Custom: EquipmentType, ErectedValue, ManufacturerGuarantee, InstallationMethod, TestingPeriodDays, ColdCommissioningDate, HotCommissioningDate, PerformanceGuaranteeTest, InterfaceRisk, ModuleCount, SpecialLiftRequired.

104 rules: equipment type acceptance lists, testing period duration limits, manufacturer guarantee adequacy checks, hot commissioning heat run triggers, DSU indemnity period vs project duration alignment.

relationships.note: Erection value and testing period drive coverage scope -- 11 project custom fields
104 rules include commissioning phase triggers and equipment acceptance lists

migrationIssues.detail: Cold and hot commissioning dates trigger coverage transitions (Works → Maintenance). GW Cloud policy period model does not natively support multi-phase coverage transitions -- custom workflow required.
Equipment type acceptance and exclusion lists (e.g., nuclear, space) in Gosu. GW Cloud underwriting rules support list-based eligibility -- configuration migration required.
DSU indemnity period linked to commissioning date. GW Cloud DSU coverage exists but commissioning-date-dependent activation logic needs custom implementation.
Post-commissioning maintenance period. GW Cloud policy extension model supports -- configuration work required for automatic activation.

cloudMapping.action: Generic phase date -- cold vs hot commissioning distinction requires custom fields
TypeKey migration required -- equipment type acceptance list migration
GW Cloud DSU exists -- commissioning-linked activation logic requires custom rule
